title: ACM Conference on Hypertext and Social Media
body: The ACM Conference on Hypertext and Social Media (previously ACM conference on Hypertext and hypermedia, ACM Hypertext)  is one of the oldest international conference series on the crossroads of Human-Computer Interaction and Information Science. The full list of conferences in the series can be found on the Association for Computing Machinery Hypertext Web page, and papers are available through the ACM Digital Library.
